mapper.sql: SELECT sd.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0)) AS billedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.receivedAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS receivedAmount FROM biz_settle_detail sd JOIN biz_settle_order so ON so.uuid = sd.settle_uuid AND so.is_deleted = 0 JOIN ( SELECT settle_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(order_amount, 0)) AS settleTotal FROM biz_settle_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY settle_uuid ) st ON st.settle_uuid = sd.settle_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT settle_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(receive_amount, 0)) AS receivedAmount FROM biz_receive_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(record_status, 1) = 1 GROUP BY settle_uuid ) rr ON rr.settle_uuid = sd.settle_uuid WHERE sd.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sd.order_uuid

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rb.order_uuid, SUM(rb.rollProcessAmount) AS scopedProcessAmount, SUM(rb.rollAmountBase) AS scopedAmountBase, MAX(rb.orderAmountBase) AS orderAmountBase FROM ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) AS rollProcessAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rollAmountBase, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) ELSE COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) END AS orderAmountBase FROM biz_original_roll r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS orderRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS orderOriginalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(process_amount, 0)) AS orderProcessAmount FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orderBase ON orderBase.order_uuid = r.order_uuid WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
) rb GROUP BY rb.order_uuid ) amountScope ON amountScope.order_uuid = o.uuid
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(o.uuid) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalRollCount), 0) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishRollCount), 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(SUM(step.knifeCount), 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(SUM(step.sawAmount), 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(step.rewindAmount), 0) AS rewindAmount,
COALESCE(SUM(amountScope.scopedProcessAmount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL AND amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST( CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
COALESCE(SUM(o.total_process_amount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_extra_amount), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.billedAmount), 0) AS settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.receivedAmount), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) - COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0), 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0)) AS lossWeight FROM biz_original_roll r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY r.order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3
AND f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.paperName}, '%')
GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(ps.knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ps.order_uuid ) step ON step.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid

choose.when:
SELECT d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName, COUNT(DISTINCT d.order_uuid) AS orderCount, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.finishRollCount), 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(d.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(d.lossWeight), 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(d.originalWeight), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(d.lossWeight), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(d.originalWeight), 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(SUM(d.knifeCount), 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(SUM(d.sawAmount), 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.rewindAmount), 0) AS rewindAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.processAmount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.extraAmount), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.totalAmount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.settledAmount), 0) AS settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.pendingSettleAmount), 0) AS pendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.receivedAmount), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(d.unreceivedAmount), 0) AS unreceivedAmount FROM ( SELECT rb.*, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderExtraAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS extraAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderTotalAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderSettledAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS settledAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderPendingSettleAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS pendingSettleAmount, CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderReceivedAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS receivedAmount, GREATEST( CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderSettledAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN rb.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN rb.orderReceivedAmount * rb.rollAmountBase / rb.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0 ) AS unreceivedAmount FROM ( SELECT r.uuid AS original_uuid, r.order_uuid,
r.paper_name AS dimensionKey, r.paper_name AS dimensionName,
COALESCE(r.machine_uuid, 'none') AS dimensionKey, COALESCE(m.machine_name, '未分配机台') AS dimensionName,
CASE WHEN r.process_mode = 3 THEN 'direct' WHEN r.main_step_type = 1 THEN 'saw' WHEN r.main_step_type = 2 THEN 'rewind' ELSE 'unset' END AS dimensionKey, CASE WHEN r.process_mode = 3 THEN '直发' WHEN r.main_step_type = 1 THEN '锯纸' WHEN r.main_step_type = 2 THEN '复卷' ELSE '未配置' END AS dimensionName,
COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0) AS lossWeight, COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) AS processAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.process_amount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rollAmountBase, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderProcessAmount, 0) WHEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(orderBase.orderOriginalWeight, 0) ELSE COALESCE(orderBase.orderRollCount, 0) END AS orderAmountBase, COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) AS orderExtraAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) AS orderTotalAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) AS orderSettledAmount, CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END AS orderPendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) AS orderReceivedAmount, COALESCE(step.knifeCount, 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(step.sawAmount, 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(step.rewindAmount, 0) AS rewindAmount, COALESCE(fin.finishRollCount, 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(fin.finishWeight, 0) AS finishWeight FROM biz_original_roll r JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = r.order_uuid LEFT JOIN sys_machine m ON m.uuid = r.machine_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS orderRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS orderOriginalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(process_amount, 0)) AS orderProcessAmount FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orderBase ON orderBase.order_uuid = r.order_uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = r.order_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT original_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY original_uuid ) step ON step.original_uuid = r.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rel.original_uuid, COUNT(DISTINCT f.uuid) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(rel.share_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_original_rel rel JOIN biz_finish_roll f ON f.uuid = rel.finish_uuid AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3 WHERE rel.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY rel.original_uuid ) fin ON fin.original_uuid = r.uuid
r.is_deleted = 0 AND
) rb ) d GROUP BY d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName ORDER BY totalAmount DESC, originalWeight DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalRollCount), 0) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishRollCount), 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SUM(orig.lossWeight), 0) / COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(SUM(step.knifeCount), 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(SUM(step.sawAmount), 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(SUM(step.rewindAmount), 0) AS rewindAmount,
COALESCE(SUM(amountScope.scopedProcessAmount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL AND amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST( CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
COALESCE(SUM(o.total_process_amount), 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_extra_amount), 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.billedAmount), 0) AS settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(SUM(settle.receivedAmount), 0) AS receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) - COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0), 0)), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
FROM biz_process_order o JOIN ( SELECT oi.uuid AS order_uuid,
DATE_FORMAT(oi.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS dimensionKey, DATE_FORMAT(oi.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS dimensionName
CAST(oi.is_invoice AS CHAR) AS dimensionKey, CASE WHEN oi.is_invoice = 1 THEN '开票' ELSE '不开票' END AS dimensionName
CAST(oi.settle_type AS CHAR) AS dimensionKey, CASE WHEN oi.settle_type = 1 THEN '次结' ELSE '月结' END AS dimensionName
CAST(oi.order_status AS CHAR) AS dimensionKey, CASE oi.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '草稿' WHEN 1 THEN '待下发' WHEN 2 THEN '加工中' WHEN 3 THEN '待回录' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已结算' ELSE CAST(oi.order_status AS CHAR) END AS dimensionName
oi.customer_uuid AS dimensionKey, oi.customer_name AS dimensionName
FROM biz_process_order oi WHERE oi.is_deleted = 0 ) d ON d.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0)) AS lossWeight FROM biz_original_roll r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY r.order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3 GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(ps.knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ps.order_uuid ) step ON step.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid
GROUP BY d.dimensionKey, d.dimensionName ORDER BY
d.dimensionKey ASC totalAmount DESC, originalWeight DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT o.uuid AS orderUuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_date AS orderDate, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.settle_type AS settleType, o.is_invoice AS isInvoice, o.order_status AS orderStatus, COALESCE(orig.originalRollCount, 0) AS originalRollCount, COALESCE(fin.finishRollCount, 0) AS finishRollCount, COALESCE(orig.paperSummary, '-') AS paperSummary, COALESCE(orig.processSummary, '-') AS processSummary, COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(fin.finishWeight, 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(orig.lossWeight, 0) AS lossWeight, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(orig.lossWeight, 0) / COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) * 100 END AS lossRatio, COALESCE(step.knifeCount, 0) AS knifeCount, COALESCE(step.sawAmount, 0) AS sawAmount, COALESCE(step.rewindAmount, 0) AS rewindAmount,
COALESCE(amountScope.scopedProcessAmount, 0) AS processAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS extraAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS settledAmount, CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL AND amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS pendingSettleAmount, CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END AS receivedAmount, GREATEST( CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END - CASE WHEN amountScope.orderAmountBase > 0 THEN COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) * amountScope.scopedAmountBase / amountScope.orderAmountBase ELSE 0 END, 0) AS unreceivedAmount
COALESCE(o.total_process_amount, 0) AS processAmount, COALESCE(o.total_extra_amount, 0) AS extraAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) AS settledAmount, CASE WHEN settle.order_uuid IS NULL THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END AS pendingSettleAmount, COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0) AS receivedAmount, GREATEST(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, 0) - COALESCE(settle.receivedAmount, 0), 0) AS unreceivedAmount
FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS originalRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight, SUM(COALESCE(r.total_loss_weight, 0)) AS lossWeight, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(r.paper_name, '/', r.gram_weight, 'g/', r.original_width, 'mm') ORDER BY r.paper_name SEPARATOR '；') AS paperSummary, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.process_mode = 3 THEN '直发' WHEN r.main_step_type = 1 THEN '锯纸' WHEN r.main_step_type = 2 THEN '复卷' ELSE '未配置' END ORDER BY r.main_step_type SEPARATOR '、') AS processSummary FROM biz_original_roll r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY r.order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, COUNT(*) AS finishRollCount, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE f.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3
AND f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.paperName}, '%')
GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ps.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(ps.knife_count, 0)) AS knifeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sawAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rewindAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ps.order_uuid ) step ON step.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC, o.order_no DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)), 0) AS totalOriginalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(r.total_loss_weight), 0) AS totalLossWeight, COALESCE(AVG(r.total_loss_ratio), 0) AS avgLossRatio FROM biz_original_roll r JOIN biz_process_order o ON r.order_uuid = o.uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status >= 4
r.is_deleted = 0 AND
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT r.machine_uuid AS machineUuid, m.machine_name AS machineName, COUNT(*) AS rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0)), 0) AS totalOutputWeight, COALESCE(SUM(sk.kc), 0) AS totalKnife, COALESCE(SUM(r.total_loss_weight), 0) AS totalLossWeight FROM biz_original_roll r JOIN sys_machine m ON r.machine_uuid = m.uuid JOIN biz_process_order o ON r.order_uuid = o.uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status >= 4 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT original_uuid, SUM(knife_count) AS kc FROM biz_process_step WHERE step_type = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY original_uuid ) sk ON sk.original_uuid = r.uuid
r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.machine_uuid IS NOT NULL AND
GROUP BY r.machine_uuid, m.machine_name ORDER BY totalOutputWeight DESC
